narrative:
Precinct Harrison (precinct in Van Wert County) has 774 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.9 percentage points.
